name: Requests!!
description:
!! Not a bot !!

✧- simply a place where you guys can leave request, I’ve realized that im gaining a bit of a following and people are leaving requests. Im not good at keeping track of things and I procrastinate A LOT, so id appreciate it if any bots you guys want to see me make are requested here.

✦- how to request a bot?

Write a review with a description of what type of role play you want, the more detailed the better!!

(Keep in mind, me responding to the review doesnt mean im immediately going to make it, im currently in the middle of finals so im very busy)

✧- i will randomly select a scenario whenever im in the mood to make a bot and hopefully it lives up to expectations!

✦- thank you!

Thank you guys so much for 100+ followers!!! (o ́罒`o)

Lowkey was just expecting to flop on here but im so surprised that not one, not two BUT THREE of my bots have passed 10k users. I really want to improve my writing and im so glad you guys get to experience my improvement with me! I hope i can make better bots for all of you to enjoy!!! <3
creator: 𝗖𝗿è𝗺𝗲.𝗖𝗮𝗸𝗲𝘀
